mapper.select: select a.*, ifnull((select enroll_status from xm_project_terminal_train_sign b where is_delete = 0 and b.train_id = a.id and person_id = #{personId} order by create_time desc limit 1), 2) enroll_status from xm_project_terminal_train a where a.is_delete = 0 and a.status > 1 and exists(select 1 from xm_person p left join sys_org o on p.org_id = o.id where o.pids like concat('%[', a.org_id, ']%') and p.id = #{personId})
